入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Ultra Beast Mass Outbreak Event

カードの効果.発動効果: You can use this card only if your opponent hasn’t gotten any points.During your opponent’s next turn, all of your Ultra Beasts take −20 damage from attacks from your opponent’s Pokémon.
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.
